rag_rules: Use `assume "label": expression;` to express input assumptions.
Place assumptions and guarantees within `annex agree { ... };` blocks.
generic_rules: AGREE contracts are scoped to their owning component declaration.
Use visible identifiers from the model index; do not invent names.
For component type contracts, use concrete bounds or relations when writing assumptions/guarantees.
anti_patterns: Do not include AADL properties (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly in AGREE expressions unless they are exposed as ports or constants.
Do not use subcomponent paths in component type annexes.
